name: vibespace
description: VibeSpace — a backend-agnostic web workspace for coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, …) with a multi-session tiling window manager

scripts.build: node scripts/i18n-check.mjs && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('src/lib/build-version.js','// GENERATED at build (gitignored) — the bundle\'s own version, compared against /api/version on ws reconnect (stale-tab auto-reload)\nexport const BUILD_VERSION = '+JSON.stringify(require('./package.json').version)+';\n')" && esbuild src/client.js --bundle --outfile=public/bundle.js --format=iife --platform=browser --target=es2020 --loader:.css=css --minify && esbuild node_modules/@novnc/novnc/core/rfb.js --bundle --outfile=public/novnc.js --format=esm --platform=browser --target=es2022 --minify && npm run build:agentd
scripts.build:agentd: node -e "const v=require('./package.json').version;require('fs').writeFileSync('src/agentd/version.js','module.exports = { VERSION: '+JSON.stringify(v)+' };\n')" && esbuild src/agentd/agentd.js --bundle --platform=node --external:node-pty --outfile=data/bin/vibespace-agentd.js && esbuild src/agentd/attach-cli.js --bundle --platform=node --outfile=data/bin/vibespace-agentd-attach.js
